role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation density and growth habits (xeric scrub).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road width, shoulders, and fencing.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed utility pole design and camera generation artifacts.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed because the specialists (and the meta-agent) confidently misidentified the location as Argentina based on a 'classic' landscape analogy and a specific utility pole design. The truth (South Africa) was in the pool but received low confidence from all agents, leading to its elimination in the early rounds. The tournament logic was sound but relied on flawed specialist inputs.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the arid scrub and red soil.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described the low shrub density.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the gravel shoulders and wooden poles.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The truth (South Africa) was in the pool but received 'low' confidence from all specialists. In the semi-2 match (Chile vs Australia), the meta-agent explicitly argued against Australia based on the utility pole style, which was the same feature used to support Argentina. The specialists collectively pointed away from the truth and towards the South American candidates.
